session.assistant:
I've reviewed the file. It imports `PlanContextProvider` only (not `PlanContext` directly). Looking at the code, I can see:
- Line 26: `from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContextProvider` - Line 72: `plan_provider = PlanContextProvider(...)` - Lines 77-82: `plan_context = plan_provider.get_plan_context(...)` - this is a variable, not the class - Lines 88-94: `plan_context_data` - variable, not the class
**Finding:** The class name `PlanContext` does not appear in this file at all. The file only uses `PlanContextProvider` (which should NOT be renamed per the instructions) and variables named `plan_context` and `plan_context_data` (which are lowercase and also should NOT be renamed per the instructions).
Since `PlanContext` (the class name) does not appear in this file, no changes are needed.
